headline: Morgan Stanley Raises PT on Valero Energy (VLO) Stock
summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 12, Morgan Stanley lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $255 from $232 and maintained an “Equal Weight” rating on the shares. While the refining margins have softened from the mid-May peak, they are still elevated compared […]
